rationale: The Clotho Phase 1 implementation plan v9 is comprehensively detailed, implementation-ready, and fully respects the governing spec v2.6 constraints. The plan successfully adopts the rigorous failsafe mechanics expected of TELOS: D29 provides a robust driver-owned accounting gate against silent under-consumption of sources, and D30 surgically eliminates loader-construction risks through a fail-closed syntactic scanner. Additionally, atomic hard-link publication semantics (D20/D28) and real-path physical containment checks (D21) provide exceptional defense-in-depth against host filesystem races. The zero-dependency and spine read-only invariants are tightly bound and mechanically proven. I approve execution.
